title: cutandia rohlfsiana
intro: Cutandia rohlfsiana, also known as False Couch Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of Cutandia rohlfsiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Cutandia rohlfsiana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to address various health concerns.
